_comment: Service registry — maps known services to their native API tools. Used by serviceResolver.ts to inject API-first guidance into the system prompt only when the user's message matches a known service. Add new services here; no code changes required.

twitch.description: Twitch streaming platform — channel and stream management
twitch.authNote: Reuse existing Twitch browser session via system_fetch (cookie-aware). No separate auth needed if user is logged in to Twitch in the Clawdia browser.
twitch.apiNote: Use PATCH /helix/channels for title/category/tags. Use GET /helix/channels for current state. Requires broadcaster_id param.

obs.description: OBS Studio — scene, source, and stream configuration via WebSocket
obs.authNote: OBS WebSocket runs locally at port 4455. Password stored in ~/.config/obs-studio/global.ini under [OBSWebSocket] > ServerPassword.
obs.apiNote: Use obs-websocket protocol v5. Call GetSceneItemList to enumerate sources, SetSceneItemTransform to reposition/resize. Always read current transform before writing.

github.description: GitHub — repository, PR, issue, and Actions management
github.authNote: Use the `gh` CLI (already authenticated). Prefer `gh pr`, `gh issue`, `gh repo`, `gh run` over browser automation or raw API calls.
github.apiNote: gh CLI covers 95% of GitHub tasks. Fall back to `gh api` for endpoints not covered by subcommands.

vscode.description: VS Code — editor configuration and extension management
vscode.authNote: Use `code` CLI for most operations. Config files live in ~/.config/Code/User/.
vscode.apiNote: Prefer editing settings.json / keybindings.json directly over GUI automation.

npm.description: npm — package installation, publishing, and script execution
npm.authNote: Use shell_exec with npm/yarn/pnpm commands directly.
npm.apiNote: npm CLI is always preferred over browser automation of npmjs.com.

spotify.description: Spotify — playback control and playlist management
spotify.authNote: Use dbus_control with MPRIS2 interface (org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.spotify) for local playback control. For playlist/library ops, use Spotify Web API with OAuth token.
spotify.apiNote: MPRIS via DBus handles play/pause/skip/volume without any API key. Web API needed for search, playlists, library.

linear.description: Linear — issue tracking and project management
linear.authNote: Linear GraphQL API at https://api.linear.app/graphql. API key stored in clawdia settings or secret store.
linear.apiNote: Use system_fetch with Authorization header. All data ops (create/update/list issues) go through the GraphQL API, not browser automation.

figma.description: Figma — design file access and export
figma.authNote: Figma REST API at https://api.figma.com/v1. Personal access token stored in settings or secret store.
figma.apiNote: Use GET /files/:key for structure, GET /images/:key for exports. Browser automation of figma.com is a last resort.

slack.authNote: Prefer Incoming Webhooks for one-way notifications (URL in settings). Use Bot token + Web API for reading/posting to channels.
slack.apiNote: POST to webhook URL via system_fetch for simple notifications. Use chat.postMessage for full control.

discord.description: Discord — messaging via webhook or bot
discord.authNote: Use webhook URL for simple channel messages. Bot token for full API access.
discord.apiNote: POST JSON to webhook URL via system_fetch. No browser automation needed.
